title: GCP Compute Engine Quiz
description: Test your knowledge on GCP Compute Engine virtual machines.

questions.question: Regarding the DevOps, what is the primary role of 'GCP Compute Engine'?
options: Providing flexible and scalable virtual machines—or 'instances'—in the cloud for your application project

questions.question: Which GCP feature or service is used to automatically adjust your project's number of Compute Engine instances as intended?
